summary: Extra line item detected. PO-2025-5005 covers three authorised line items (air compressors, maintenance service, pneumatic accessories). Invoice SI-FAC-2025-1144 adds SI-TRN-99 On-site Technical Training (2 days x MXN 3,500 = MXN 7,000) which is not in the original PO. Three PO lines match exactly in price and quantity. Partial approval for PO-authorised lines (MXN 34,238.00 including tax); training line held pending separate change order or approval.

exceptions.description: SI-TRN-99 (On-site Technical Training 2 days x MXN 3,500 = MXN 7,000 + IVA) is not authorised by PO-2025-5005
exceptions.resolution: Hold MXN 9,240.00 (training + IVA). Approve remaining MXN 31,998.00.

agent_insights: 3 PO-authorised lines match exactly — partial approve MXN 31,998.00
Training line SI-TRN-99 requires change order or separate PO
GRN-5005-A confirms delivery of equipment and maintenance service
Vendor instructed to issue credit note or separate PO for training
